name: Sweet & Sour Lentils with Brown Rice
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring water to a boil and cook lentils for 25 minutes.
2. Drain and set aside. Combine vinegar, honey, tamari, ginger, and water. Bring to a boil.
3. Mix cornstarch with a little water and add to the sauce.
4. Saute onion in oil until soft. Add pieces of celery and cook over medium heat for 5 minutes.
5. Add lentils and mix well. Add sauce and simmer for 5 minutes.
6. Serve over rice.
